title: MS-Painted, but its bad. (MS-Painted, BIB)
description: Minecraft but the Microsoft Painted Textures are horrible. HAH HEH. (Alpha)
body:
# Chu-Index Presents:  MS-Painted, but it's bad (MS-Painted, BIB)!
>  Note this is still in early beta, please now know that things textures will likley change 'till it's perfect in my opinion.
- This Resource Pack is simple especialy what the freakin' title says: "Minecraft, but it is horribly MS-Painted". If you can't tell it's a Vanilla (Totally) Resource Pack, no Optifine required! [Back to if you can't tell] it's a resource pack that changes Minecraft textures to HORRIBLE I MEAN **HORRIBLE!** painted. Hope you enjoy this weird-Vanilla pack! [Maybe not]
# Features
- Adds a whole new texture to things.
- Makes things harder to read
- And all of it is completley free, no Opti-Fine required!

## Join the [Chu-Index](https://discord.gg/Ns9Vjyw7h9) Discord!
[discord.gg/chu-index](https://discord.gg/Ns9Vjyw7h9) (not actual link but I want boosts for that)
